description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named bins that runs on push to the master branch, excluding changes to the docs directory. The workflow can also be triggered by a workflow call with optional inputs for lnav_version_number and upload_url. In an ubuntu-latest job running in a tstack/lnav-build:1 container, checkout the code, run the entrypoint.sh script, and then optionally build a musl package if lnav_version_number is provided. Upload a build artifact and a musl-binary archive to a release if upload_url is provided.
